articles.title: Asia stocks extend rally on tech surge, US-Iran peace hopes - Investing.com
articles.description: Asia stocks extend rally on tech surge, US-Iran peace hopes
articles.content: Investing.com-- Asian stocks extended their rally on Wednesday, with technology shares tracking strong gains on Wall Street, while cautious optimism over a potential U.S.-Iran diplomatic breakthrough… [+1994 chars]
